company.name: Tata Consultancy Services Pvt LTD
company.description: Working as an Assistant System Engineer with focus on full stack development, automation, and scripting solutions.

education.degree: Bachelor's in ECE (Electronics and Communication Engineering)

achievements.text: A certain task would have taken a total of 7-10 days of work but with the help of scripting I had automated all the task from extraction of data to validation in within 3 days.
Created an API with the help of Node JS, Express, Cheerio and Puppeteer and implemented it with Microsoft Flow to generate an alert in our Teams group.
Also created several automation scripts to help my team deliver the tasks on time.
